note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right heel wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Right heel measures 1.3 cm x 1.6 cm x 0.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 32% slough, 68% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Right heel — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Offloading boot applied.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Right heel measures aprx 1.3 x 1.6cm, depth 0.4cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 0.8x1.0, 0.2cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
